# youtrack_auth_module_oauth2 (Resource)

Manages a Hub OAuth 2.0 authentication module. This resource allows configuring an external OAuth 2.0 identity provider for Hub.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    youtrack = {
      source = "registry.opentofu.org/elcait/youtrack"
    }
  }
}

provider "youtrack" {
  base_url = "https://youtrack.example.com"
  token    = "your-api-token"
}

# Minimal OAuth 2.0 auth module – only required fields
resource "youtrack_auth_module_oauth2" "minimal" {
  name          = "My OAuth2 Provider"
  client_id     = "my-client-id"
  client_secret = "my-client-secret"
  server_url    = "https://idp.example.com"
  token_url     = "https://idp.example.com/oauth2/token"
}

# Full OAuth 2.0 auth module – typical Keycloak / generic IdP configuration
resource "youtrack_auth_module_oauth2" "keycloak" {
  name                      = "Keycloak"
  disabled                  = false
  client_id                 = "hub"
  client_secret             = var.keycloak_client_secret
  server_url                = "https://keycloak.example.com/realms/myrealm"
  token_url                 = "https://keycloak.example.com/realms/myrealm/protocol/openid-connect/token"
  scope                     = "openid email profile"
  user_info_url             = "https://keycloak.example.com/realms/myrealm/protocol/openid-connect/userinfo"
  idp_logout_url            = "https://keycloak.example.com/realms/myrealm/protocol/openid-connect/logout"
  form_client_auth          = false
  email_verified_by_default = true
  allowed_create_new_users  = true
  background_sync_enabled   = false

  # Claim mappings
  user_id_path     = "sub"
  user_email_path  = "email"
  user_name_path   = "preferred_username"
  full_name_path   = "name"
  user_groups_path = "groups"

  # Timeouts (milliseconds)
  connection_timeout = 5000
  read_timeout       = 10000
}

variable "keycloak_client_secret" {
  description = "Keycloak client secret for the Hub OAuth 2.0 auth module."
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) OAuth 2.0 client ID registered with the identity provider.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth 2.0 client secret. This value is write-only and is not returned by the API.
- `name` (String) Display name of the auth module.
- `server_url` (String) Base URL of the OAuth 2.0 authorization server (identity provider).
- `token_url` (String) URL of the token endpoint at the identity provider.
- `user_id_path` (String) JSON path expression to the user ID claim in the identity provider response.

### Optional

- `allowed_create_new_users` (Boolean) Whether new users may be created on first login via this module. Defaults to false.
- `background_sync_enabled` (Boolean) Whether background synchronisation with the identity provider is enabled. Defaults to false.
- `connection_timeout` (Number) Connection timeout in milliseconds when contacting the identity provider.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the auth module is disabled. Defaults to false.
- `email_verified_by_default` (Boolean) Whether email addresses from this provider are considered verified by default. Defaults to false.
- `extension_grant_type` (String) Custom OAuth 2.0 extension grant type.
- `form_client_auth` (Boolean) Whether to send client credentials in the request body instead of the Authorization header. Defaults to false.
- `full_name_path` (String) JSON path expression to the full name claim in the identity provider response.
- `icon_url` (String) URL of a custom icon to display for this auth module.
- `idp_logout_url` (String) URL of the identity provider logout endpoint.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this auth module is the default login method. Defaults to false.
- `read_timeout` (Number) Read timeout in milliseconds when contacting the identity provider.
- `redirect_uri` (String) OAuth 2.0 redirect URI. When omitted, Hub sets this automatically.
- `scope` (String) Space-separated list of OAuth 2.0 scopes to request.
- `sync_interval` (String) Cron expression that controls background synchronisation frequency.
- `user_avatar_url` (String) URL used by Hub to retrieve the user's avatar from the identity provider.
- `user_email_path` (String) JSON path expression to the email claim in the identity provider response.
- `user_email_url` (String) URL used by Hub to retrieve the user's email address from the identity provider.
- `user_email_verified_path` (String) JSON path expression to the email-verified claim in the identity provider response.
- `user_groups_path` (String) JSON path expression to the groups claim in the identity provider response.
- `user_info_url` (String) URL of the userinfo endpoint at the identity provider.
- `user_name_path` (String) JSON path expression to the username claim in the identity provider response.
- `user_picture_id_path` (String) JSON path expression to the picture ID claim in the identity provider response.
- `user_picture_url_pattern` (String) URL pattern used to build the picture URL from the picture ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Hub ID of the auth module (computed).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an OAuth 2.0 auth module by its Hub ID.
# The ID can be found in the Hub admin UI or via the Hub REST API:
#   GET <hub-url>/hub/api/rest/authmodules?fields=id,name&query=name:MyModuleName
terraform import youtrack_auth_module_oauth2.<RESOURCE_NAME> <AUTH_MODULE_ID>
```
